title: scaevola glutinosa
intro: Scaevola glutinosa, also known as the sticky fan flower, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scaevola glutinosa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Scaevola glutinosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
